title: Add top navigation bar with four cemetery sections

requirements.text: Replace or augment the existing navigation tiles in PublicPage.tsx with a sticky top navigation bar that contains four clearly labeled sections: 'Grave Map' (Mapa grobów), 'Search' (Wyszukiwanie), 'Prayer for the Deceased' (Modlitwa za zmarłych), and 'Our Cemetery' (Nasz cmentarz). The bar must be placed at the top of the public page, below the existing Header component, and allow smooth, instant switching between the four sections by scrolling to or revealing the corresponding content area.

quotes: Chciałbym żebyś na pasku nawigacji - na górze aplikacji umieścił w sposób estetyczny: "Mapa grobów", "Wyszukiwanie", "Modlitwa za zmarłych", "Nasz cmentarz"
Pasek nawigacji u góry z czterema sekcjami: Mapa grobów, Wyszukiwanie, Modlitwa za zmarłych, Nasz cmentarz

acceptanceCriteria: A horizontal sticky navigation bar is visible at the top of the public page with exactly four items: Mapa grobów, Wyszukiwanie, Modlitwa za zmarłych, Nasz cmentarz.
Clicking any navigation item immediately activates and displays the corresponding section.
The active navigation item is visually distinguished (e.g., underline, highlight, or accent color) from inactive items.
Navigation transitions are smooth and do not cause full page reloads.
The bar is responsive and looks aesthetically appropriate on both desktop and mobile screen sizes.
The bar remains accessible (sticky) while scrolling through the page content.
Labels displayed match the Polish text: Mapa grobów, Wyszukiwanie, Modlitwa za zmarłych, Nasz cmentarz.

requirements.text: Remove or hide the existing PublicSectionsTiles grid component (the four large tile cards) from PublicPage.tsx since its navigation role is now fulfilled by the new top navigation bar. The four content sections themselves (map, search, prayer, cemetery info) must remain fully functional and visible when their respective nav item is selected.

quotes: żeby można było szybko, sprawnie i płynnie nawigować

acceptanceCriteria: The large navigation tile grid (PublicSectionsTiles) is no longer rendered on the public page.
All four content sections (grave map, search, prayer, cemetery info) remain accessible via the new navigation bar.
No visual duplication of navigation controls exists on the public page.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
The existing Header component must remain in place above the new navigation bar.
Backend code must not be changed.
nonGoals: Adding new backend endpoints or data structures.
Changing the content or logic of the four sections themselves (only navigation/layout changes).
